chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Misc. Application No.S-648 of 2022 (Manthar Ali Solangi Vs. The State & others) Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For Orders on office objection. 2. For hearing of main case. 06-03-2023. Mr. Niazuddin N.Memon, advocate for the applicant..-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- 1. Deferred. 2. It is stated by learned counsel for the applicant that it is case of missing person, therefore the instant application u/s 491 Cr.P.C to be fixed before Division Bench after converting the same into petition. No such exercise could be undertaken by this Court at the costs of its previous time. The instant Crl. Misc. Application is dismissed, directing the applicant to file a petition for the purpose, subject to its maintainability, if so is advised to him. JUDGE Nasim /PA
